title: I.Sicily inscription 001196
support: The description as being 'pietra basaltica' of Manni Piraino is implausible, since the photograph shows a compact stone in no way similar to typical Etna lava stone; it must be a dark compact limestone. Likely part of a base originally?

handNote.lettering: Neat and large, finely carved letters ('un po irregulare' of Manni Piraino seems unjust). Epsilon with short middle bar; theta, omicron and omega small and above the line; theta with full width horizontal; omega closed and elongated. Sigma wide with horizontal outer strokes.

provenanceFound._: Observed already by Gualtherus in San Marco 'in pariete prope ianuam', subsequently donated to the museum by the town.

museum.name: Museo Archeologico Regionale Antonino Salinas
museum.description: Partially reopened following extensive restoration work. Comprehensive collection of archaeological material, predominantly from the West of the island, with an important Etruscan collection.

location.address: Centre of Palermo, Piazza Olivella 24, 90100 - Palermo
